title: Ghastling Ghastly
description: Trim-able harness ,harness enchantments and so on!
body:
# Happy Ghast aren't as defenseless as they once were - New harness features here!
> **New Enchantments**
1. Ghastling: Happy Ghasts fly faster when players ride them
- Max Levels : 3

2. Innocence Guardian: Grants 20% protection and additional regeneration with each level
- Max Levels : 4

1.悠魂：当玩家骑乘快乐恶魂时它们会飞得更快
- 最高等级：3

2.纯真守护：每级提供20%的保护和额外的生命恢复效果
- 最高等级：4
- 很难不让人联想到某位来自理塘的纯真少年

> **Harness Upgrading**

You can upgrade harness at a smithing table using phantom membranes and ingots to gain armor value and additional attributes.

你可以在锻造台使用幻翼膜和矿物锭来升级挽具以获得护甲值和额外属性

> **Trimable Harness**

You can trim the harness just like armor

你可以像定制盔甲那样定制你的挽具
